description_long: This is a pair of dangling earrings featuring a combination of metallic and faceted spherical elements. The upper section consists of a gold-toned hook attached to a cylindrical connector, followed by a small round bead and a thin metallic coil. Below this, a large, faceted, dark gray bead forms the central visual focus, suspended by a thin wire. The lower part of each earring is adorned with a hollow, geometric, polygonal gold-toned pendant, adding a modern and angular touch. The overall design is symmetrical and visually balanced, with a mix of smooth and faceted surfaces that catch the light. The materials appear to be primarily metal and glass or polished stone, giving the earrings a refined, contemporary look.
description: A pair of gold-toned dangling earrings with faceted dark gray beads and geometric hollow pendants, combining metallic and glassy textures for a modern, elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earrings with clear visibility of the faceted gray beads and the hollow geometric gold pendants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the geometric pendant and the spherical nature of the beads.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the geometric pendants and faceted beads visible, but with subtle differences in light reflection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the profile of the earring, showing the pendant's hollow structure and the alignment of the beads.
